mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0%, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and lower corporate earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 60-day returns remain positive in 70% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0%, or Rank IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real sales of automobiles combined with expanding industrial production indicates synchronized demand and supply strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint increases in RSAFS and INDPRO fail to predict positive 20-day returns with a win rate above 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in imminent monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in 65% of cases when CPIAUCSL accelerates, or the signal loses predictive power during disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising household income, which supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rolling 3-year Rank IC for PAYEMS growth against 60-day forward returns remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in housing starts signals deteriorating consumer confidence and reduced construction sector activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines by more than 5% month-over-month
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are positive in over 60% of instances following a 5% monthly decline in HOUST.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in industrial production and real GDP growth confirms robust economic momentum, reducing recession risk and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between INDPRO and GDPC1 growth rates yields a negative or insignificant coefficient in out-of-sample return regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated unemployment during a period of restrictive monetary policy indicates a policy-induced economic slowdown, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no significant negative drift when UNRATE rises alongside FEDFUNDS above 3.5%, or win rate drops below 45%.
